segments.text: we
rise we stay
they only see the sand in the story they only
see the scone in the frame but we got city lights
street drums late nights millions of hearts with
fire in the name from cairo rooftops to the river
from alexandria out to the sea we don't need the
world to understand us we just need the world
to breathe mama said keep your soul protected baba
said keep your head up high even when the news
gets reckless don't let the fear move
into your eyes and if the whole world
shakes we put rhythm in the ground out if
the guard gets loud we make a brighter sound
we still dance when the night gets
heavy still sing when the sky turns gray
hands up if your heart stays ready love don't
break we find a way we still move when the drums
start crawling still shine when the lights go low
if one heart feels like falling we lift it up and
let it know
yalla yalla
we rise we stay
yalla yalla
love leads the way
this ain't a postcard this is people
this ain't a camel in the scene
this is bass in the alley
kids in the traffic
dreams in the dust
trying to stay clean
this is gold in the voice of the aunties
this is tea when the night runs deep
this is jokes when the pressure gets ugly
this is faith when it's hard to sleep
i see mothers holding families together
i see fathers praying on the street like glow
i see young ones building a house
Something better with a beat in the blood
Than a long way to go
When the world says break
When the fear says bow
When the pain gets loud
We sing now
We still dance when the night gets heavy
Still see when the sky turns gray
Hands up if your heart stays ready
Love don't break, we find a way
We still move when the drums start calling
Still shout when the lights go low
If one heart feels like falling
Then stand up and let it know
Heart beating in the drums
Love for everyone
Y'all up, y'all up
We rise, we stack
Y'all up, y'all up
We rise, we stack
No black should be a reason for sorrow
No child should be afraid of tomorrow
No
No
From every border, every prayer
Every voice in the air
We are more than what they show you
More than war on screen
More than pain in the headlines
More than ancient history
This is for the strong ones
The tired ones
The ones still smiling when life gets wild
This is not just pride
This is beast with a pulse
This is culture
With arms
Open wide
So let the oud cry
Let the drum talk
Let the whole room move
Like the now walk
If your heart hurts
Bring it close
We don't dance alone
We still dance when the night gets heavy
Still sing when the sky turns gray
Hands up if your heart stays ready
Love don't break, we find a way
We still move when the drums start calling
Still shout when the lights go low
If one heart feels like falling
We lift it up and let it know
Your love, your love
We rise we stay
Your love, your love
Love leads the way
Your must, your must
Still dance when you still strong
